description: Recto: Hebrew poetry in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Verso: Note in Arabic script. The first preserved line reads "[...] Arabic and Hebrew" (عربي وعبراني). Maybe an ownership note: "belonging to Abū Isḥāq b. Hilāl al-Ḥazzān al-Baghdādī" (i.e., Abū Isḥāq the son of Hillel b. ʿEli). The last line is difficult to read.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
